allow: Bash(cmd.exe /c "gh issue create --title ""docs\(infra\): add SECURITY.md with vulnerability reporting policy"" --label ""domain:dev,infra"" --body ""## Context\\nThe repository does not have a SECURITY.md file. GitHub surfaces this prominently for public repos and it is part of the community health baseline. Without it, potential reporters have no guidance on how to handle security issues, and GitHub marks the repo as incomplete in the community profile.\\n\\nContact email available: kurz@vnc-online.de\\n\\n## Action\\nCreate SECURITY.md at the repository root with:\\n- Supported versions section \(note: pre-release / no stable version yet\)\\n- Vulnerability reporting instructions \(email kurz@vnc-online.de, expected response time\)\\n- Brief scope note \(this is an architecture reference project, not a production service\)\\n- Standard disclaimer about responsible disclosure\\n\\nKeep it short and honest — no false promises about SLAs that don''t exist.\\n\\n## Acceptance criteria\\n- [ ] SECURITY.md exists at repo root\\n- [ ] Contains a contact method \(email\)\\n- [ ] GitHub community profile shows SECURITY.md as present\\n- [ ] Language consistent with repo \(English or German — match README\)""")

Bash(cmd.exe /c "gh issue create --title ""docs\(infra\): add SECURITY.md with vulnerability reporting policy"" --label ""domain:dev,infra"" --body ""## Context\\nThe repository does not have a SECURITY.md file. GitHub surfaces this prominently for public repos and it is part of the community health baseline. Without it, potential reporters have no guidance on how to handle security issues, and GitHub marks the repo as incomplete in the community profile.\\n\\nContact email available: kurz@vnc-online.de\\n\\n## Action\\nCreate SECURITY.md at the repository root with:\\n- Supported versions section \(note: pre-release / no stable version yet\)\\n- Vulnerability reporting instructions \(email kurz@vnc-online.de, expected response time\)\\n- Brief scope note \(this is an architecture reference project, not a production service\)\\n- Standard disclaimer about responsible disclosure\\n\\nKeep it short and honest -- no false promises about SLAs that do not exist.\\n\\n## Acceptance criteria\\n- [ ] SECURITY.md exists at repo root\\n- [ ] Contains a contact method \(email\)\\n- [ ] GitHub community profile shows SECURITY.md as present\\n- [ ] Language consistent with repo \(English or German -- match README\)""")

Bash(cmd.exe /c "gh issue create --title ""docs\(infra\): add SECURITY.md"" --label ""domain:dev,infra"" --body ""Context: No SECURITY.md exists. Action: Create it with contact email kurz@vnc-online.de and vulnerability reporting instructions."" 2>&1")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "gh issue create --title ''docs\(infra\): add SECURITY.md with vulnerability reporting policy'' --label ''domain:dev,infra'' --body ''placeholder'' 2>&1")
